hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE 'rm[[:space:]]+-rf[[:space:]]+/|git[[:space:]]+push[[:space:]].*(--force|-f[[:space:]])|git[[:space:]]+reset[[:space:]]+--hard|DROP[[:space:]]+(TABLE|DATABASE|SCHEMA)|mkfs\.'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Guard-shell: comando destrutivo detectado."}}'; fi
input=$(cat); printf "%s [BASH] %s\n" "$(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S)" "$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | head -c 200)" >> ~/.claude/bash-audit.log 2>/dev/null || true

printf '{"systemMessage":"✅ Sessao encerrada. Checklist:
  - progress.md atualizado?
  - TaskLink/sistema registrado?
  - Commit feito?
  - git push enviado?
  - Harness completo?"}'
